title: Growth Ops / Mid / Weak / Stable execution only

candidate_profile.domain_background: Content platform acquisition and channel operations
candidate_profile.target_role_summary: Mid-level operator who is stable in execution but weak in strategy and experimentation
candidate_profile.current_context: Applying for a growth role expected to combine diagnosis, experiment design, and execution

outline.question_goal: see whether the problem is clearly defined

outline.quality_expectation: must explain data organization and initial review
must go beyond saying some channels were average
must explain what was actually changed
must identify a decision personally made

outline.question_goal: test whether the role was only execution support
test whether difficulty description is concrete
outline.quality_expectation: must not stop at generic coordination issues
must explain earlier testing and faster elimination

expected_disc.notes: The sample should look like a stable executor with limited push and weak ownership.
expected_disc.surface_vs_validated: It should not be upgraded into high D or high C just because it sounds orderly.

expected_findings: can execute baseline tasks but lacks strong growth experimentation thinking
coordination method relies mostly on reminders and follow-up
expected_followup_directions: ask for a specific experiment design and sample size
ask for a concrete action personally decided and owned
ask how stop-loss would be handled if the numbers did not improve
evaluation_focus: can the system detect stable execution but weak strategy
can the system highlight thin ownership
can the system produce validation-oriented operations follow-ups
notes: This should serve as a weak baseline sample for growth operations.
